bead.title: Migrate service_providers.go claude consumers
bead.description:

bead.acceptance:
1. service_providers.go drops claudeharness imports for claude paths
2. ClaudeQuotaSnapshot{} construction at service_providers.go:620 moves inside claude.Runner.RefreshQuota
3. Health-check callbacks become qh.RefreshQuota(ctx) calls
4. go test ./... passes; structural-diff fixtures pass
